title: AIT: Remixed
description: The official AIT: Remixed server modpack.
body:
## THIS PACK IS NO LONGER IN USE!! ### use the pack here > https://discord.com/channels/1213989169878274068/1366428664228610069 ---------- This is the official modpack for the Amble Labs public server. It includes 140+ mods that improve the server experience. It is _required_ to have this pack to play on the server. This pack includes optimization mods and a custom mod built specifically for the server, as well as a few patches. -------------

Q&A!

- Q: **When will this be updated?** A: This pack will only be updated when we change stuff on the server! - Q: **Where is the forge version?** The public server is using Fabric so this pack will not be ported to Forge. - Q: **Will this be on Curseforge?** A: This pack will only be on Modrinth because some mods are not on CurseForge. - Q: **Can you add .... mod?** A: Nope these mods are here because they are on the server OR enhance the client experiance, we will not be adding any mods unless the whole team approves of it. - Q: **Can I use this on my server?** A: Yes feel free. But please credit this pack! -------------

Credits

- Check out AmbleLabs [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/amble-labs) - Check out the full modlist [here](https://github.com/amblelabs/modpack/tree/main/mods)
